title: State Department requires electronic filing for EB-5 applications
description_html: As of June, 2018, all applicants filing an I-526 petition (EB-5) are required to process their visa applications electronically. The National Visa Center will need an email address for all applicants in order to communicate and receive applicable case information. [ID #516]
